title: Slack vs Slack Integration Plus

posts.author: KirstenLeighton (Kirsten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Slack vs Slack Integrateplus

Hi All,

can someone help me understand the difference in features and benefits in functionality regarding just using slack vs using Slack Integrate plus. I am struggling to understand the difference

Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kirsten,

I’d recommend reaching out directly to the Slack team on this as they can likely provide you with a more concrete explanation of the differences! You can reach them here, Slack Help Centre | Slack!

posts.author: jprakash (Jay Prakash)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @KirstenLeighton
Thanks for your interest in Slack IntegratePlus for monday.com. Here’s a quick summary of the main differences. We hope this helps. Alternatively, we’d be delighted to understand your particular use case in more detail so we can help identify how the app could help. Kindly let us know. BTW, we do offer a free 14 day trial in case you want to try out the functionality for yourself. Best regards, Jay

posts.author: asharma (Ankur Sharma - Upscale (Part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kirsten,

Hope you’re doing well!

Although it’s been a while since this thread opened up, just wanted to reach out with something that would be helpful.

We put together a comparison chart for Integrate Plus for monday.com vs the native monday.com integration with Slack. Here’s the image version of the same if it’s more convenient:

image2000×964 373 KB

Hope this helps!

Should you have any questions at all, feel free to reach out to us at integrateplus@adaptavist.com
